title: stachys kotschyi
intro: Stachys kotschyi, also known as 'Istanbul Spiked Lavender', is a perennial herb native to the Middle East and Mediterranean regions. Its medicinal properties include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Stachys kotschyi include relief from digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce stress and promote relaxation. Stachys kotschyi can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in aromatherapy to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
